title: Work and life in dynamic equilibrium.
author_string: Bodinof Jachowski, Catherine M, Schoenle, Laura A, Alaasam, Valentina J, Govenor, Heather, Hope, Sydney F
abstract: We reframe the idea of balancing career and non-career interests for ecologists specifically. We introduce the concept of a dynamic work-life equilibrium (WLE) and draw parallels between ecological processes and processes affecting our continuously fluctuating sense of balance, with an aim at encouraging self-reflection and improving WLE mentoring in ecological disciplines.
